# POST /api/v1/notifications/history/search

**Search notification history**

بحث سجل الإشعارات - API-NOTIF-003

Operation ID: `searchHistory`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Response `200` — OK

Shape: `paginated list of NotificationLogResponse (see Pagination Envelope in index.md)`

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer (int64) | No |  | Log entry ID |
| recipientId | integer (int64) | No |  | Recipient user ID (Security USERS_PK) |
| notificationTypeId | string | No |  | Channel used for this row (LOV-NOTIF-001) |
| templateCode | string | No |  | Template natural code |
| subject | string | No |  | Subject (primarily Email channel) |
| bodyPreview | string | No |  | Short preview of the sent content |
| notificationStatusId | string | No |  | Delivery status (LOV-NOTIF-002) |
| retryCount | integer (int32) | No |  | Delivery retry attempts (ceiling 5) |
| sentAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Actual send timestamp — null until sent |
| moduleCode | string | No |  | Publishing module code |
| referenceId | integer (int64) | No |  | Polymorphic reference to the related business record |
| referenceType | string | No |  | Related entity type name |
| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Created timestamp |
| createdBy | string | No |  | Created by |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  | Updated timestamp |
| updatedBy | string | No |  | Updated by |
